videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description:
New Yorkers, join us in the first ever Mayor’s Municipal Madness: a competition of city fixes where everyone wins.

City workers fix thousands of tiny annoyances every year, from broken basketball rims to bike path bumps. This year, we’re highlighting 16 of those fixes. 

From the exacerbating eight to the frustrating four, every item in each round will be repaired…but you’ll be voting on which fix will be done by me on day 100 of our admin. 

Round one of voting starts right now: nyc.gov/madnes

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description:
Happy Nowruz, New York City.

As Persian and other communities welcome the new year, I joined some members of our team to learn about the Haft-seen table — a tradition rooted in renewal, reflection, and hope. 

This Nowruz, to honor the tradition, my administration is displaying a haft-seen in City Hall. Wishing you all a new year filled with peace, light & understanding.

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description:
Government must deliver for working people—and every dollar in our budget should work as hard as they do.

That’s why I directed every agency to cut waste and help close our budget gap.

Here’s some of what we found.

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description:
The Bronx showed up! Yesterday, we held our latest Rental Ripoff Hearing in the BX. If you missed it, we still want to hear from you.
 
Submit your testimony at rentalripoffs.nyc.gov → click ‘Submit Testimony’ at the top, OR sign up for the next two hearings in Harlem and Staten Island.

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description: A beautiful week to announce expanded 3-K on Staten Island.

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description:
In 2015, Chinatown Tenants Union helped win the first rent freeze in 46 years.

In 2026, @DMJulieSu and @caaavnyc are spreading the word about our Rental Ripoff Hearings to working-class families in Chinatown who are once again facing rising costs and housing instability.

Tomorrow’s Rental Ripoff Hearing is at capacity, but we want every voice to be heard. Submit your testimony or register to attend a future hearing at rentalripoffs.nyc.gov

videos.title: Video by nycmayor
videos.description: Kids grow fast, and so do we. This fall, we’re adding more than 1,000 seats for universal 3-K in 56 zip codes. Childcare will be more accessible and affordable across all five boroughs.

videos.title: I’m proud to be supporting my friend Brad Lander for Congress.  @Brad...
videos.description: I’m proud to be supporting my friend Brad Lander for Congress.  @BradLander has spent his career taking on big fights for New York’s working families. He’ll bring principled leadership to Washington and make sure Congress works for the many, not just the few.  If you’re ready to fight back, contribute to Brad’s people-powered campaign. Every dollar helps fuel the movement we need to win: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lander-zm-betterdemocrats?refcode=zmvideo

videos.title: Revisiting Election Night
videos.description: Before the victory speech and celebrations on November 4, there were hours of anxious waiting as we watched the numbers come in. Here's a glimpse of it all, stress and joy alike. Thank you to every New Yorker who believed in this fight for working people. I am so proud to be sworn in as your Mayor tomorrow.

videos.title: THE MAYOR IS LISTENING
videos.description:
On December 14th, I sat across from 142 New Yorkers as they shared their concerns, their dreams, the leadership they long for from City Hall. 

Our campaign was built around listening to the people of New York, and we will govern in the same way. Tomorrow, we get to work.

RSVP To join the Inauguration Block Party tomorrow:  https://t.co/6QvoGxuRFw


Subtitle track is available in settings.

videos.title: My #1 Canvasser: My Mother
videos.description:
In less than a week, I will be sworn in as the next mayor of New York City. It was only possible because of the more than 100,000 people who volunteered on our campaign. Here’s a story about one of them, my mother.

Filmed in June 2025 as we followed her on an afternoon of canvassing in Richmond Hill, Queens, right before the primary election.

www.Transition2025.com

videos.title: Mayor for 8,478,000 New Yorkers
videos.description:
This past Sunday, from 8am to 8pm, New Yorkers from every corner of our city traveled to the Museum of the Moving Image in Astoria to share their dreams, their worries, the change they want to see across New York. It was an honor listening to each of them. 

We're excited to share more from this incredible day with you very soon.

www.transition2025.com

videos.title: Kuf Alef Kislev
videos.description: Last night marked Kuf Alef Kislev, the 81st anniversary of the Satmar Rebbe Joel Teitelbaum’s escape from Nazi-occupied Europe. His rescue and later founding of the Williamsburg Hasidic community helped shape the future of our city. These celebrations recognize that history and the remarkable rebirth that followed. I was so grateful to join and greet the rebbes.

videos.title: Starbucks on Strike! With Bernie Sanders
videos.description:
More than 2,500 Starbucks workers are on strike. They’re demanding dignity: fair pay, safe conditions, a contract that respects their labor.

It’s time their voices are heard at the same volume as CEOs earning millions.

Go to https://sbworkersunited.org/ to learn more about what Starbucks baristas are striking for

And visit https://www.transition2025.com to learn more about how we are getting ready to build an affordable NYC starting on day one.

videos.title: Zohran Kwame Mamdani - More than 2,500 Starbucks workers are on strike. They’re demanding di...
videos.description: More than 2,500 Starbucks workers are on strike. They’re demanding dignity: fair pay, safe conditions, a contract that respects their labor.  It’s time their voices are heard at the same volume as CEOs earning millions. https://t.co/8ZXB0opNut

videos.title: No Contract? No Coffee!
videos.description:
We don't believe in sitting on the sidelines. Transition Team co-Chair Lina Khan & First Deputy Mayor Dean Fuleihan join Starbucks Workers United members on the picket line in Lower Manhattan.

Learn more about why Starbucks Workers United are striking across the country here:
https://sbworkersunited.org/our-strike/

Donate to support our transition here so we can build an affordable city on day one:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-dtc-20251118

videos.title: Getting the Team Together
videos.description:
If you’re wondering who’s guiding our transition, it’s the best New Yorkers that money can’t buy.

Donate here to help us build an affordable New York City starting on day one:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cc4zm

videos.title: We need your help! But let me explain why.
videos.description:
We've got a lot of work to do before January 1st, and we need your help. But let me explain why we need it, and what we're going to do with it. 

Please donate what you can to our transition fund at http://www.Transition2025.com and let's build a New York City we can all afford — together.

Donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-dtc-20251118
